rationale: Gov't Code §2306.227 governs prepayment of mortgage loans under the Texas Department of Housing chapter. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A mortgage loan made under this chapter may be prepaid to maturity after the period of years and under the terms and conditions determined by the board.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns mortgage loan prepayment, unrelated to homestead exemption appraisal threshold.
